rationale: The citing paper studies intrayear category demand cycles in UK CPG advertising/pricing, while the cited paper focuses on marketing- vs WOM-driven customer acquisition and customer equity in a web-hosting startup, so topical overlap is limited. However, both notes emphasize VAR modeling and impulse-response-based long-run effects, making a methodological use plausible, and the evidence here is only a bare DOI match with no in-text citation context.
